## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it matter?

## Target Branch

- Normal work targets `develop`.
- Release PRs use `release/vX.Y.Z -> main`.
- Hotfix work must be merged back into `develop`.

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] Other:
